title: UK Covid-19 Inquiry: Core decision-making and political governance (Modules 2, 2A, 2B, 2C) Report
body: "Modules 2, 2A, 2B, 2C   Modules 2, 2A, 2B, 2C Report - Core decision-making and political governance Modules 2, 2A, 2B, 2C Report ‘In-Brief’ summary - Core decision-making and political governance The ‘In Brief’ summary is available in English, Welsh, English Easy Read, British Sign Language, a video animation and audio format   Reports related to the Inquiry’s further Modules will be published later. A full list of the topics that the Inquiry is investigating can be found in the Terms of Reference. "
